prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热但学校声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热情，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年5048名基础上小幅后移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约5098名，区间4598–5598名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5745→4721→4580→4434→5048. Over the past 4 years, there was an overall forward trend (cumulative forward shift of about 1311 places from 2021 to 2024), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift (614 places backward compared to 2024), with the 2025 baseline around 5048. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 70 in 2021, 69 in 2022, 71 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 69 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 69, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 20th from 2021 to 2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and 21st in 2026, stable within the Top 20–23 range, with an extremely high institutional level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving academic misconduct incidents such as paper fabrication by the dean of the College of Life Sciences (8 incidents, 7 negative), which may suppress some application enthusiasm. Douyin heat ranking is 36th overall (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. No obvious gaps in historical admission records. 14 A- or above disciplines: Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, Theoretical Economics A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Political Science A, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. The Physics Category enrollment majors cover Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Finance, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics-related majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), Mathematics/Statistics (recommended) continue to see rising popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin (not in Guangdong Province), so it is not a local university for Guangdong, with no local preference. In recent years, the number of students enrolled in Guangdong is about 100–110 (accounting for about 3%–5% of total national enrollment), with a stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the approximately 3.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province, the continued high heat of popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, but the negative reputation incidents that may suppress some application enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 5048 (due to slightly intensified competition). The predicted minimum ranking is about 5098, with a range of 4598–5598.

Tier 1 Boling Class and Mathematics and Big Data can be used as reach targets (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range). Tier 3 Material Science and Future Industry Elite can serve as safety options. Within this range, applying to Nankai University's Physics Category has a high probability of admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated around 750→730→850→711→964, showing significant volatility. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 711–850 range, but in 2025 it clearly shifted back to 964 (a backward shift of 253 places compared to 2024). The baseline for 2025 is approximately 964th place. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 25 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 34 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 35, an increase of 1 person compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 2.94%), marking the fourth consecutive year of expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 20th from 2021 to 2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and 21st in 2026, consistently in the top 20–23 range, indicating a very high level of institution. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct incidents such as paper fabrication by the dean of the College of Life Sciences, which may suppress some application enthusiasm. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure. No obvious gaps in historical admission records were observed. It has 14 A- or above disciplines: Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Marxist Theory A, etc. The History Category enrollment majors cover Economics, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, History, Business Administration, Law, etc., highlighting strong advantages in the humanities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity among humanities-related majors is polarized: Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics (differentiated wait-and-see), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese (recommended). In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin (not within Guangdong Province), so there is no local preference for Guangdong admissions. In recent years, the number of students admitted from Guangdong has been around 100–110 (accounting for about 3%–5% of total national admissions), a stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear backward trend in 2025 rankings, the small expansion of about 2.94% in 2026, the significant increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, and the negative reputation incidents that may suppress some application enthusiasm, the mitigating effect of the expansion is insufficient to offset the intensified competition caused by the larger examinee pool. It is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 964th place. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 996th place, with a range of 882–1110th place.
